title: lavandula stoechas subsp. cariensis
intro: Lavandula stoechas subsp. cariensis, also known as the 'Cretan Lavender', is a subspecies of the lavender plant that is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues, anxiety, and insomnia, due to its calming and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Lavandula stoechas subsp. cariensis include reducing stress and promoting relaxation, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. It is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, essential oils, and topical creams, which can be used to soothe skin irritations and promote a sense of calm and well-being.
